name: Krea 2 (open weights)
summary: Open-weight foundation image model that makes aesthetic, style-controlled images in about 2 seconds. Grab the Raw and Turbo weights on Hugging Face (free commercial use for individuals and small teams) or call it via fal at $0.03 an image.

name: Mistral OCR 4
summary: Turn PDFs and scans into structured data — bounding boxes, typed blocks for tables, equations, and signatures, plus per-word confidence across 170 languages. Hit it via API at $4 per 1,000 pages, or self-host the container to keep documents private.

name: Kilo Next-Edit
summary: Get instant next-edit suggestions in VS Code or JetBrains — Kilo guesses the change you're about to make and applies it as you type, powered by Inception's diffusion model. Free for everyone through July 23 in the open-source Kilo agent.

name: Firefly AI Assistant
summary: Describe your brand in plain English and the AI Assistant generates a complete logo, brand identity, and color palette you can apply across every project. Live now in the Firefly web app, with the assistant rolling into Photoshop, Premiere, and Illustrator.

name: Antigravity CLI
summary: Free terminal coding agent that runs multiple sub-agents in the background, so you can fire off big refactors or parallel research without locking up your session. Ships as a single Go binary and replaces the retired Gemini CLI for individual devs.

name: Agent Finder for Copilot
summary: Describe a coding task in plain English and Copilot searches a catalog of agent tools, MCP servers, and skills, then surfaces ranked matches it can pull in on demand — nothing gets wired up without your say-so. Free for all Copilot plans.

name: Grok Imagine Video 1.5
summary: Turn a still image into a 6-second clip with sound effects, ambience, and dialogue generated in the same pass, no separate audio step. Runs in the grok.com app and on iOS/Android, and the API is $4.20/min versus Sora's $30.

name: MiniMax Hub
summary: Make a whole short film in one app — image, video, voiceover, music, and editing together, no juggling separate tools. Built for solo creators, with indie filmmakers already shipping shorts on it.
